tasks.name: Add Config API Routes
tasks.prompt:
Implement configuration API routes in bin/orchestra-serve for agents, skills, and hooks CRUD.

Add these routes using Python stdlib (the file uses http.server):

1. GET /api/config/paths - return {global_path, project_path} for ~/.claude and .claude
2. GET /api/config/agents - list all agents with scope (global/project)
3. GET /api/config/agents/{name} - get agent content
4. PUT /api/config/agents/{name} - create/update agent (body: {scope, content})
5. DELETE /api/config/agents/{name} - delete agent
6. GET /api/config/skills - list all skills
7. GET /api/config/skills/{name} - get skill content
8. PUT /api/config/skills/{name} - create/update skill
9. DELETE /api/config/skills/{name} - delete skill
10. GET /api/config/hooks - list hook profiles (strict, standard, minimal)

Also add do_PUT, do_DELETE, do_OPTIONS methods to the handler.

Agent files are at ~/.claude/agents/{name}.md (global) or .claude/agents/{name}.md (project)
Skill files are at ~/.claude/skills/{name}/SKILL.md

Edit the file bin/orchestra-serve to add these routes.

tasks.name: Add Workspace API Routes
tasks.prompt:
Implement workspace API routes in bin/orchestra-serve for task management.

Add these routes:

1. GET /api/workspace/repos - list available repos from ~/projects and common locations
2. GET /api/workspace/repos/{path}/tasks - list tasks.json files in repo
3. POST /api/workspace/tasks - create task file
4. PUT /api/workspace/tasks/{id} - update task
5. DELETE /api/workspace/tasks/{id} - delete task
6. POST /api/workspace/tasks/{id}/run - execute task via orchestra binary

Task format:
{
  "id": "task-slug",
  "name": "Task Name",
  "prompt": "...",
  "workdir": "/path/to/repo",
  "model": "opus",
  "agents": "agent1,agent2",
  "skills": "skill1,skill2",
  "status": "pending"
}

For run endpoint, spawn orchestra binary and return {run_id}.

Edit the file bin/orchestra-serve to add these routes.

tasks.name: Add SSE Streaming
tasks.prompt:
Implement Server-Sent Events (SSE) streaming in bin/orchestra-serve for real-time updates.

Add:

1. GET /api/events - SSE endpoint that streams events to clients

Event types:
- run_started, run_progress, run_completed
- task_started, task_progress, task_completed
- stage_started, stage_completed

Implementation:
- Add SSEBroker class to manage connected clients
- Add LogWatcher thread to monitor logs directory for state.json changes
- Watch for new .stream.jsonl lines for progress events
- Send heartbeat every 15 seconds
- Use Content-Type: text/event-stream

Format: event: <type>\ndata: <json>\n\n

Edit the file bin/orchestra-serve to add SSE support.
